description_long: This is a classic red coupe car with bold black racing stripes running from the front hood to the rear, giving it a sporty and aggressive appearance. The car features a long hood, a short rear deck, and a fastback roofline, characteristic of American muscle cars from the late 1960s. The wheels are black with chrome accents, and the tires are wide, suggesting high performance. The windows are tinted and the side mirrors are mounted on the doors. Chrome trim is visible around the windows and along the lower body, adding a touch of vintage style. The rear of the car has a single round taillight and a chrome bumper, while the front showcases a wide grille and prominent headlights.
description: A classic red coupe car with black racing stripes, chrome trim, and a fastback roofline, evoking the style of a late 1960s American muscle car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, dual headlights, and bold black racing stripes on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long hood, fastback roofline, two doors, and chrome wheel rims.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single round taillight, chrome bumper, and continuation of the black stripes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe's sleek profile and window configuration.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
